title: Youtube poop: Sonic Underground The F%&king Remake
description:
yet again I have remade another one of my classics this time it is Sonic Underground the original was one of the reasons people started watching my movie and subscribing to me it was the bait and they were the fish lol XD anyways the original was not one of my favorite poops in fact... its one of my least favorites (some may disagree with me about that) but when I look back at that it feels like I could have done a lot more so I did it again but with adobe premiere. some of the old jokes never made it in this poop sorry if you really like those jokes but I replaced them with completely new jokes. I hope you like this more than the original (give me your honest opinion)
